covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from Oregon Health Authority
covid_surveillance.long_description: Oregon Health Authority collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

influenza_surveillance.short_description: Weekly influenza surveillance data from Oregon Health Authority
influenza_surveillance.long_description: Oregon Health Authority collects and reports influenza surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

rsv_surveillance.short_description: Weekly rsv surveillance data from Oregon Health Authority
rsv_surveillance.long_description: Oregon Health Authority collects and reports rsv surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

or_dph.name: Oregon Health Authority
or_dph.description: Oregon Health Authority provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Oregon covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
or_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
